title: Grilled Shrimp and Char Skewers with Algerian Spices and Samphire
description: A flavorful and spicy seafood dish, perfect for a summer evening. The combination of grilled shrimp and char skewers with algerian spices and samphire is a unique twist on traditional grill recipes.
instructions: Thread shrimp and char onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together algerian spices, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Brush the spice mixture onto both sides of the shrimp and char.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the shrimp are pink and the char is cooked through.
Meanwhile, trim the ends off the samphire and cut it into 1-inch pieces.
When the skewers are done, remove them from the grill and let them rest for a few minutes.
Serve the skewers hot with the samphire on the side.
Garnish with lemon wedges and serve immediately.
